default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Marcel's business vision and potential partnership opportunities with AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel is building an AI agency and has seen rapid growth, onboarding major clients like Ramp and Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [He wants to go "all-in" on promoting AirOps but needs more investment/commitment from AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Opportunities for AirOps training/certification, dedicated expert resources, and co-marketing activities](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Business Vision

  - [Building an AI agency focused on content, personalization, training](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Hiring offshore talent, providing AI training to make them highly valuable](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Goal is to be the go-to "AI enablement" partner for companies](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Rapidly growing, on track for $1-1.5M revenue just a few months in](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)

### Promoting AirOps

  - [Has driven significant leads/customers to AirOps through webinars, word-of-mouth](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [But feeling nervous about going "all-in" without deeper commitment from AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Wants formal partnership for training, certification, dedicated resources](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)

### Potential Partnership Areas

  - #### AirOps Training/Certification
      - [Follow "Clay" model of certified experts/consultants](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
      - [Marcel can develop courses, hire/train people to deliver training](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
      - [In-person workshops for companies like Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - #### Dedicated Expert Resources
      - [Offer lower-cost tiers with AirOps experts available on-demand](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
      - [Marcel's team could provide fully trained resources at $2k/person](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
  - #### Co-Marketing Activities
      - [Partner pages, affiliate programs on AirOps website](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
      - [CMO dinners and other co-marketing events](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Eoin to discuss partnership opportunities with Matt and Alex](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Explore revamping AirOps website for better learning resources](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [Set up in-person meeting when Marcel is in Chicago for Ramp training](https://fathom.video/share/YhFges4vWTu6nMWFVwNMJo6cQzhHNhK7?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)

action_items.description: Propose options for mentioning fwd.digital on the AirOps website, subject to legal review and approval from AirOps leadership
Develop a joint AirOps certification program in partnership with fwd.digital to help customers scale AirOps usage, subject to approval from AirOps leadership

Develop training processes and materials to help customers scale from beginner to advanced AirOps proficiency. Work with Marcel to generate user-generated content and improve AirOps website information architecture and content to make training resources more discoverable.
